Class DeleteBuilder<T>

java.lang.Object
dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.builder.DeleteBuilder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the item
public class DeleteBuilder<T> extends Object
A fluent builder for deleting an item from a DynamoDB table by its key, with an optional condition expression. Part of the DynamoDB Simplified library.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DeleteBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbTable<T> table, @NonNull Object partitionKey, @Nullable Object sortKey, @Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient dynamoDbClient)
    Constructs a new DeleteBuilder for the given table and key.

    Configures a condition expression that gates the delete operation.

    Configures a condition expression that gates the delete operation.

    execute()
    Executes the delete operation and returns the deleted item.

    Adds a condition that the specified attribute must exist on the item for the deletion to succeed.

    Configures the return values for the delete operation.

  • Constructor Details

    • DeleteBuilder

      public DeleteBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbTable<T> table, @NonNull Object partitionKey, @Nullable Object sortKey, @Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient dynamoDbClient)
      Constructs a new DeleteBuilder for the given table and key.
      Parameters:
      table - the DynamoDB table
      partitionKey - the partition key value
      sortKey - the sort key value (may be null if the table has no sort key)
      dynamoDbClient - the low-level DynamoDB client (required for returnValues support)

  • Method Details

    • condition

      public @NonNull DeleteBuilder<T> condition(@NonNull Consumer<ConditionExpression.Builder> configurator)
      Configures a condition expression that gates the delete operation. DynamoDB evaluates this condition before deleting the item (unlike a filter expression which applies after reading).
      Parameters:
      configurator - a consumer to build the condition expression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • condition

      public @NonNull DeleteBuilder<T> condition(@Nullable ConditionExpression condition)
      Configures a condition expression that gates the delete operation. DynamoDB evaluates this condition before deleting the item (unlike a filter expression which applies after reading).
      Parameters:
      condition - the condition expression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • onlyIfExists

      public @NonNull DeleteBuilder<T> onlyIfExists(@NonNull String attribute)
      Adds a condition that the specified attribute must exist on the item for the deletion to succeed.
      Parameters:
      attribute - the attribute name to check for existence
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • returnValues

      public @NonNull DeleteBuilder<T> returnValues(@Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ReturnValue returnValues)
      Configures the return values for the delete operation. When set (e.g., ReturnValue.ALL_OLD), the operation falls back to the low-level DynamoDbClient.deleteItem(DeleteItemRequest) to include the return values in the request.
      Parameters:
      returnValues - the return value setting, or null to use the default
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • execute

      public @NonNull Optional<T> execute()
      Executes the delete operation and returns the deleted item.
      Returns:
      the deleted item, or empty if no item matched the key
